titles.title: If Heaven Was Never Promised to Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You may ask me why do You serve the Lord Is it just for heaven's gain Or to walk those mighty streets of gold Or to hear the angels sing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Is it just to drink from that fountain That never shall run dry Or is it to live forever, ever, and ever In that sweet old by and by

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But if heaven never was promised to me Neither God's promise to live eternally It's been worth just having the Lord in my life I was livin' in a world of darkness But he brought me the light

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If there were never any streets of gold Neither a land where we will never grow old It's been worth just having the Lord in my life I was livin' in a world of darkness But He brought me the light

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He's been my closest friend down through the years And every time I cry you know He dries all my tears It's been worth just having the Lord in my life I was livin' in a world of darkness But He brought me the light

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You know I was livin' in a world of darkness But He brought me the light I was livin' in a world of darkness But He brought me the light
